question: In this R package, which classes define an S4 method for the generic `cbind`? List the class names.
Which classes provide an S4 method for `as.data.frame` in this package? List them.
The Snakemake rule `deseq2_init` runs an R script. Which R file does it execute? Reply with the repo-relative path.
Which Snakemake rule produces the STAR-aligned BAM (Aligned.sortedByCoord.out.bam)? Name the rule.
Which external aligner tool does the `star_align` rule run via its snakemake wrapper? Name the tool.
Within this package, which function(s) call `nbinomWaldTest`? List caller name(s).
gtSource: R/core.R DESeq + refitWithoutOutliers; R/lfcShrink.R lfcShrink all call nbinomWaldTest

question: scRNA_QC.py runs `Rscript %s/scRNAseq_qc_filtering.R` where %s is a runtime path. Is the exact on-disk path statically resolvable from this repo? Yes/No + one sentence.
groundTruth: No — RSCRIPT_PATH = resource_filename('MAESTRO','R') resolved at runtime to the install dir; not statically determinable.

question: Where is the user-input validation/type-checking logic concentrated in this package? One file or 'not localizable'.
groundTruth: Not localizable — inline checks scattered across methods; no single validation module.
